routes.documentation: Retrieve repository info for a Mendix app (type: svn or git, url).

responses.body: {"errorCode":"UNAUTHORIZED","errorMessage":"Missing or invalid MxToken. Ensure the Authorization header is set to 'MxToken <your-PAT>'"}
responses.label: Unauthorized

routes.documentation: Retrieve a paginated list of branches for a repository. Supports ?limit and ?cursor query params.

responses.body: {"items":[{"name":"main","latestCommit":{"id":"a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0","author":{"name":"Jean-Luc Picard","email":"jean-luc.picard@starfleet.com"},"date":"2024-03-10T09:00:00Z","message":"Release 2.5.0 - warp core stabilization","mendixVersion":"10.6.0","relatedStories":["US-1234"]}},{"name":"feature/holodeck-diagnostics","latestCommit":{"id":"b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1","author":{"name":"Geordi La Forge","email":"geordi.laforge@starfleet.com"},"date":"2024-03-12T14:30:00Z","message":"WIP: holodeck safety interlock bypass diagnostics","mendixVersion":"10.6.0","relatedStories":["US-1300"]}},{"name":"hotfix/shield-matrix","latestCommit":{"id":"c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1d2","author":{"name":"Worf","email":"worf.son-of-mogh@starfleet.com"},"date":"2024-03-11T22:15:00Z","message":"Emergency patch: shield matrix frequency calibration","mendixVersion":"10.6.0","relatedStories":["BUG-567"]}}],"cursors":{"first":null,"prev":null,"next":null,"last":null}}

routes.documentation: Retrieve info about a specific branch (URL-encode the branch name).
Retrieve commits on a branch in reverse chronological order. Supports ?limit and ?cursor query params.
